title: Enumeration values should follow a naming convention
description: Enumeration values should comply with a naming conventionAnalyze your codeconsistency-identifiablemaintainabilityCode SmellconventionWhy is this an issue?Shared coding conventions allow teams to collaborate efficiently. This rule checks that all enumeration values match a provided regular expression.Noncompliant code exampleWith default provided regular expression:enum SomeEnumeration { some // Non-Compliant };Compliant solutionenum SomeEnumeration { SOME };Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource Sàrl. All rights reserved.Privacy Policy|Cookie Policy|Terms of Use
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Enumeration values should follow ALL_CAPS convention (e.g., COLOR_RED, not Color_Red or colorRed).
